description_long: This object consists of two combat knives, each featuring a robust, tactical design. One knife has a striking deep blue blade with a partially serrated spine and a black, ribbed handle, likely made for enhanced grip. The other knife displays a vivid red-orange blade with a similar serrated back edge and a matching black handle, capped with a red pommel. Both blades are straight, single-edged, and have a pronounced point, suitable for piercing and cutting. The handles are cylindrical with ergonomic grooves and a guard at the base to protect the user's hand. The overall appearance suggests these are modern, military-style knives, possibly inspired by the classic KA-BAR or survival knife designs.
description: A pair of modern, tactical combat knives—one with a blue blade and one with a red-orange blade—each featuring serrated spines, pointed tips, and black ribbed handles with guards.
description_view_0: Both knives are fully visible, showing their colored blades, serrated spines, and black ribbed handles with guards.
description_view_1: The knives are seen edge-on, highlighting the thickness of the blades and the profile of the handles.
description_view_2: The knives are displayed from the opposite side, again showing the colored blades and the ergonomic handle design.
description_view_3: A top-down view reveals the pommels and the alignment of the handles, with the blades mostly obscured.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, partially serrated, pointed tip
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, black, ribbed grip, ergonomic grooves, capped pommel
